title: Mea Maxima Culpa: Silence in the House of God
original_title: Mea Maxima Culpa: Silence in the House of God
overview: Alex Gibney explores the charged issue of pedophilia in the Catholic Church, following a trail from the first known protest against clerical sexual abuse in the United States and all way to the Vatican.
